events.title: Crafters & makers
events.description: Friday night is free. Browse handmade goods from local makers. Hot sauce vendors are not selling bottles this evening.

events.title: Trivia
events.description: Team or solo trivia on the festival floor—details and timing to be announced.

events.title: Pepper-themed mobile escape room
events.description: A traveling escape room with a pepper theme, on site Friday and Saturday.

events.title: Hot sauce people’s choice
events.description: Voting may open Friday night for favorite sauces, with winners announced Saturday. If it runs, polls would stay open through roughly the first two hours Saturday.

events.title: Hot sauce vendors
events.description: Small-batch makers sampling and selling bottles—local and visiting brands, larger layout than year one.

events.title: League of Fire pepper contest
events.description: The main eating competition: experienced competitors and newcomers take on the League of Fire format.

events.title: Food vendors
events.description: Food trucks and stands with snacks and full plates—see the roster below.
events.jumpLinkLabel: View food trucks and other vendors

events.title: Pittsburgh Hot Talk
events.description: A Hot Ones–style interview: Pittsburgh guests and a lineup of sauces, hosted at the fest.

events.title: Scavenger hunt
events.description: Clues and checkpoints around the venue; finish for prizes or perks (details at the event).

events.title: Fire & aerial show
events.description: Iron City Circus Arts returns with fire performance and aerial work designed to light up the night.

events.title: Fire & ice challenge with Nervana
events.description: Optional ice bath or a fire-then-ice sequence to increase the donation. Run with Nervana Health (formerly Pittsburgh Tub Club); proceeds support Animal Friends for Veterans.

events.title: DJ & games
events.description: Pinball loft, pool, air hockey, and a DJ on the schedule.

events.title: 10-wing challenge
events.description: Ten wings, increasing heat—available as a ticket add-on when sales open.
